title: Crazy Stuff [CRST]
description:
Crazy Stuff alias CRST adds a whole universe into your world with a lot of reference to pop culture and conspiracy !
CRST is quite complete and contains advancements.
body:
![Crazy Stuff logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/369b76f714b6dbef3e53d49e9b32ea3791e66871.png)

**Crazy Stuff** alias **CRST** adds a whole universe into your world with a lot of reference to pop culture and conspiracy !
CRST is quite complete. It includes advancements and tooltips to help you understand the mod, which is essential.

Firstly, you need Forge and **you must install the GeckoLib dependency**.
JEI is compatible with CRST.

## CRST adds for example :

- a mob, the Shadow Walker, you wants his head so he wants to slaughter you.
- 3 enchantments at least, the Lightning Strike, the TNT Strike and the Powerless Enemy.
- a new effect which allows you to teleport yourself under the block you're on
- a new villager type, the Economy Governor and his house in the taiga villages, he doesn't like the Shadow Walker too.
- the Snow Shoes, shoes that turns powder snow into snow.
- decorations like Christmas Balls to pimp your christmas tree.
- more but i let you discover all of this !

![Preview of the all the items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/566fac3e9dc2e393d5fd3b4e8e52deda6d106ea3.png)

## Supported languages :

- English
- French

You can contact me in the comments below or in private messages !
I'm also available on Reddit !

Have fun !
